title: Please proof read and make it more positive for our client.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Please proof read and make it more positive for our client.

Dear All,

Please find attached “enhancement.xlsx” for confirmed requests from 4-May meeting. Regarding the outstanding questions, please find my update below.

If you have any enquiry, please let me know. We are welcome to provide the best effort to satisfy your needs. Thanks.

Payment Term Info
FWD only has expiry date. We don’t have logic to calculate the paid and remaining term.

ID Type
FWD has field for government ID and passport. We cannot identify the type by ID pattern or nationality.

Occupation Info
FWD maintain a list of industry and occupation. Please find the attached occupation.xlsx for your reference.

Annual Statement Upload
We can upload the annual statement by SFTP. The file size is about 400KB each. You may reference attached sample.

Policy Daily Cash Value Info
FWD can provide the actual value in the file. While the annual statement which prepare by different system, it uses different figure and logic for projection.
Therefore, the projection in Datafeed will have different face value.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Dear All,

I hope this email finds you well. Please find attached the “enhancement.xlsx” document, which includes the confirmed requests from our 4-May meeting. We are pleased to update you on the outstanding questions below.

If you have any further enquiries, please do not hesitate to reach out to us. Our priority is to provide you with the best service possible, and we are always happy to help.

Payment Term Info
At the moment, FWD is unable to calculate paid and remaining terms, but we can still provide you with the expiry date.

ID Type
For government ID and passport fields, we are unable to identify the type by ID pattern or nationality.

Occupation Info
We maintain a comprehensive list of industries and occupations, which you can find in the attached occupation.xlsx document.

Annual Statement Upload
We can upload your annual statement via SFTP, and the file size is approximately 400KB each. Please refer to the attached sample for further guidance.

Policy Daily Cash Value Info
FWD can provide the actual value in the file. However, the annual statement that is prepared by a different system may use a different figure and logic for projection. Therefore, the projection in Datafeed may have a different face value.

Thank you for choosing FWD as your insurance provider. We appreciate your continued support.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: LifeAsia is a comprehensive life insurance administration system designed to manage and automate the entire life insurance policy life cycle, from processing new policies to managing claims and renewals. It is specifically designed for insurers and agents to streamline their processes and improve customer service. LifeAsia offers a range of features including underwriting, policy administration, claims management, commission tracking, and document management. It helps companies to increase efficiency, reduce errors, and improve overall productivity.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Please proof read and fine tune these statement

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Sure! Please provide me with the statement you would like me to proofread and fine-tune.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: You may advise the method to present these information in the Datafeed files.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Here are a few possible versions of the statement:

1. We would appreciate your advice on the best way to present this information in the Datafeed files.

2. If you have any suggestions on how to present this information in the Datafeed files, please let us know.

3. We are seeking guidance on the most effective method to present this information in the Datafeed files, and would appreciate your input.

4. Could you kindly advise us on how to present this information in the Datafeed files in the most user-friendly way possible?

5. Your expert opinion on how to effectively present this information in the Datafeed files would be greatly appreciated.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
proof read this sentance
Data schema is not yet finalized

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
The sentence is grammatically correct, but it could be improved for clarity. Here are a few possible rephrasings:

1. The data schema has not yet been finalized.
2. We are still finalizing the data schema.
3. The data schema has not been fully determined at this time.
4. We are currently in the process of finalizing the data schema and it is not yet complete.
5. As of now, the data schema has not been finalized.
